CategoryCreate.description:
Schema for creating a category, optionally with nested subcategories.

- ``taxonomy_id`` is required for root categories and ignored when
  ``supercategory_id`` is provided (the parent's taxonomy is inherited).
- ``supercategory_id`` is optional; when set the new category becomes a
  nested category under that parent.

Schema for creating a component with optional sub-components.

This schema is used for recursive creation of components with sub-components.

Owner ID and parent ID are inferred from the parent product within the CRUD layer.

ComponentRead.description:
Read schema for components (nested inside a base product tree).

Components denormalize their root base product's ``owner_id``, but we
don't expose it to API clients (the role distinction belongs in the
response shape, not the payload). ``parent_id`` and ``amount_in_parent``
are required by the database's role invariant.

get.description: Get all Raspberry Pi cameras of the current user.

parameters.description: Include the last-known telemetry snapshot from the Redis cache. Implies ``include_status=true``. No relay round-trips — cameras without cached telemetry come back with ``telemetry: null``.
parameters.name: include_telemetry

schema.description: Include the last-known telemetry snapshot from the Redis cache. Implies ``include_status=true``. No relay round-trips — cameras without cached telemetry come back with ``telemetry: null``.
schema.title: Include Telemetry
Response Get User Cameras V1 Plugins Rpi Cam Cameras Get

get.summary: Get Raspberry Pi cameras of the current user

post.description:
Register a new Raspberry Pi camera.

The normal user flow is /plugins/rpi-cam/pairing/claim. This endpoint is
kept as a structured API surface for tests/admin automation and still
requires a public device key.
post.summary: Register new Raspberry Pi camera

get.description: Get single Raspberry Pi camera by ID, if owned by the current user.

parameters.description: Include last-known telemetry from the Redis cache. Implies ``include_status=true``.
parameters.name: include_telemetry

schema.description: Include last-known telemetry from the Redis cache. Implies ``include_status=true``.
schema.title: Include Telemetry
Response Get User Camera V1 Plugins Rpi Cam Cameras  Camera Id  Get

get.summary: Get Raspberry Pi camera by ID

post.description: Capture a still image with a remote Raspberry Pi Camera and store it in the file storage. Send optional parent type and ID in the request body to associate the image with another object.
post.summary: Capture a still image with a remote Raspberry Pi Camera

get.description: Forward an LL-HLS request to the camera over its WebSocket relay. Playlist requests return ``application/vnd.apple.mpegurl`` text; segment/part requests return binary ``video/mp4`` or ``video/iso.segment``. The frontend simply points ``hls.js`` / ``expo-video`` at this URL and the player walks the manifest on its own.
get.summary: Proxy LL-HLS playlists and segments from the camera's MediaMTX

get.description: Relays GET /system/local-access to the Pi via the WebSocket connection. Returns the local API key and candidate IP addresses so the frontend can auto-configure Ethernet/USB-C direct access without manual key copying. Returns 503 when the camera is offline.
get.summary: Get local direct-connection info for a camera

delete.description:
Stop the active YouTube recording, end the livestream, and create the video record.

Cleanup order is: YouTube first, then the Pi. If the Pi is offline the YouTube broadcast
must still be torn down to avoid leaving orphan broadcasts on the user's channel. A Pi
cleanup failure degrades to a warning — the recording state on YouTube is what the user
cares about, and a running MediaMTX stream will eventually be noticed and stopped anyway.

get.description: Fetch the current remote camera stream status from the Raspberry Pi camera plugin.
get.summary: Get the active YouTube recording stream status

post.description: Start a YouTube recording stream and cache the backend-owned session in Redis.
post.summary: Start recording to YouTube

get.description: Get the YouTube monitor stream for the active backend-owned recording session.
Get Raspberry Pi camera online status.
get.summary: Get Raspberry Pi camera online status

get.description: Return the most recent telemetry snapshot for the camera. Backed by a Redis cache with a 120s TTL so mosaic polling does not fan out one relay round-trip per camera on every refresh. Pass ``force_refresh=true`` to bypass the cache and re-fetch from the Pi.
get.summary: Get a camera's latest telemetry snapshot

post.description: Claim a pairing code and create a WebSocket-relayed camera.
post.summary: Claim a pairing code and create a camera (called by user)

get.description: Poll for pairing completion. Returns non-secret relay metadata once claimed.

post.description: Register a short-lived pairing code and the camera's public device key.
post.summary: Register a pairing code (called by RPi)

get.description:
Get public profile statistics for a specified user by username.

Returns 404 if the user is not found or if the profile is marked as private (and you are not the user).
Includes lazy initialization of stats if they are missing.
get.summary: Get public profile of a user

get.summary: Get the category tree of a taxonomy
